title: Alaska’s seizure of a bootlegger’s plane was legal, Supreme Court says
summary: James Brooks Alaska Beacon When the state of Alaska seized a bootlegger’s plane, it did not violate the U.S. Constitution’s excessive fines clause, the Alaska Supreme Court has ruled. The ruling , published April 18, involves a 13-year-old dispute that followed the conviction of Kenneth Jouppi for a...

title: AST Assault 4 and DC: Palmer [AK25039808]
summary: On 04/27/2025 at approximately 1346 hours, AST responded to an address off of Marth Road in Palmer for a disturbance. Investigation revealed Otto Wendt, age 53 of Palmer, had caused minor injuries to a family member. In the midst of the investigation Otto attempted to flee and slam the door on AST. title: AST Improper Use of Plates, No Insurance: Glennallen [AK25039650]
incident_type: Improper Use of Plates, No Insurance
summary: On 04/26/2025 Glennallen AST conducted a traffic stop on silver Ford F150 for multiple equipment violations. Investigation revealed that the driver Robert Murray, age 41 of Kenny Lake, was driving a vehicle with a license plate registered to a different vehicle and driving with no liability insurance. Murray was charged with Improper Use of Plates and No Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance and issued misdemeanor citations with a mandatory court appearance. The vehicle was impounded.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
topic: Improper Use of Plates, No Insurance

charges: issued misdemeanor citations with a mandatory court appearance
entities.address_detail: silver Ford F150 for multiple equipment violations
